# Apache HTTPD (AJP) — custom-to-root-context

AJP proxy at /app/, app at root /. The proxy strips the /app prefix before forwarding to the backend root. PUSH uses a direct HTTP/WebSocket proxy since AJP does not carry WebSocket frames.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/app/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
RewriteEngine on
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Upgrade} websocket [NC]
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Connection} upgrade [NC]
RewriteRule ^/app/(.*) "ws://vaadin:8080/$1" [P,L]

ProxyPass         "/app/"      ajp://vaadin:8009/
ProxyPassReverse  "/app/"      /
ProxyPassReverseCookiePath "/" "/app"

```
